summary: Ran ruff lint check on suite-api/ directory. Found 74 total issues: 60 E402 (import not at top), 6 F841 (unused variables), 8 F401 (unused imports). Top files: pipeline.py (29), app.py (28), marketplace_router.py (4). 7 issues are auto-fixable, 6 more with unsafe-fixes.
issues: E402 (60 instances): Module imports appear after non-import code, primarily in app.py and pipeline.py due to conditional/exception-wrapped imports
F841 (6 instances): Unused local variables in analytics_router.py that are assigned but never referenced
F401 (8 instances): Unused imports in connectors_router.py, fail_router.py, marketplace_router.py, rate_limiter.py, and mcp_router.py
